description.ko: 초고압을 견디도록 설계된 최첨단 잠수정으로, 생물 발광 센서와 강화 티타늄 외장을 갖추고 초심해대의 신비로운 심연을 탐사합니다.
description.en: A high-tech submersible designed to withstand extreme pressure while navigating the mysterious depths of the Hadal zone, featuring bioluminescent sensors and reinforced titanium plating.

prompt: A futuristic deep-sea submersible named AQUA-5 navigating a dark ocean trench, bioluminescent flora and fauna glowing in the background, high-tech sensors emitting soft blue light, reinforced titanium hull, underwater particles, volumetric lighting, epic scale, 8k resolution, cinematic atmosphere.
